summary: Vendor Intelligence and Behavior Modeling feature fully tested. All 18 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified with Vendor Intelligence Dashboard showing stats cards, vendor table with sortable columns, search filter, and vendor detail side panel with Reference Behavior and Automation Performance bars.
critical_code_review_comments: VendorIntelligenceService properly initialized with MongoDB indexes at startup
Vendor profiles rebuilt from historical documents - 16 vendors from 25 documents
No stable vendors yet (threshold: 50 invoices + 90% automation rate) - this is expected per the agent note
Vendor-aware resolver hints working - returns preferred_domain and search_order_boost for vendors with 3+ documents
Domain distribution tracked: purchase=4, shipping=1, sales=0, unknown=11

All required profile fields present: vendor_no, vendor_name, invoice_count, po_reference_frequency, bol_presence_rate, shipment_reference_frequency, typical_reference_domain, stable_vendor_flag, automation_success_rate, typical_bc_match_types
Frontend VendorIntelligencePage shows all 4 stats cards (Total Vendors, Stable Vendors, Avg Automation, Avg Resolution)
Vendor detail panel opens with Reference Behavior bars (PO References, Shipment References, BOL Present) and Automation Performance bars (Resolution Success, Automation Success, Validation Pass)
Sidebar correctly shows 'Vendor Intel' nav item with Users icon
seed_data_creation: Used existing vendor profiles rebuilt from historical documents. Test vendor: TUMALO CREEK Transportation (6 invoices, 100% PO reference frequency, purchase domain)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Intelligence feature tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/vendor-intelligence/stats (returns total_vendors, stable_vendors, avg_automation_rate, avg_resolution_rate, domain_distribution), GET /api/vendor-intelligence/profiles (paginated list with profiles array and total count), GET /api/vendor-intelligence/profiles/{vendor_id} (single profile detail), POST /api/vendor-intelligence/rebuild (triggers background rebuild), GET /api/vendor-intelligence/resolver-hints/{vendor_name} (returns has_hints, preferred_domain, search_order_boost for vendors with 3+ docs). Frontend page: /vendor-intelligence with VendorIntelligencePage.js showing stats cards, sortable table, search filter, and detail side panel. Vendor profile fields: vendor_no, vendor_name, invoice_count, po_reference_frequency, bol_presence_rate, shipment_reference_frequency, typical_reference_domain, stable_vendor_flag, automation_success_rate, typical_bc_match_types.

GET /api/vendor-intelligence/stats.evidence: Returns total_vendors=16, stable_vendors=0, avg_automation_rate=0, avg_resolution_rate=0, domain_distribution={purchase:4, sales:0, shipping:1}

GET /api/vendor-intelligence/profiles.evidence: Returns profiles array with total=16. Supports skip/limit pagination and sort_by parameter (invoice_count, automation_success_rate, reference_resolution_success_rate)

GET /api/vendor-intelligence/profiles/{v.evidence: Returns single vendor profile with all behavioral metrics. Returns 404 for non-existent vendors.

POST /api/vendor-intelligence/rebuild.evidence: Returns {status: 'rebuild_started', message: 'Vendor profiles are being rebuilt from historical data.'}

GET /api/vendor-intelligence/resolver-hi.evidence: Returns hints for TUMALO CREEK Transportation: has_hints=true, preferred_domain=purchase, prioritize_entity=purchase_order, search_order_boost=[purchase_order, posted_purchase_invoice]

vendor_profile_required_fields.evidence: All profiles contain: vendor_no, vendor_name, invoice_count, po_reference_frequency, bol_presence_rate, shipment_reference_frequency, typical_reference_domain, stable_vendor_flag, automation_success_rate, typical_bc_match_types

vendor_intelligence_page_stats_cards.evidence: Screenshot shows 4 cards: Total Vendors (16), Stable Vendors (0), Avg Automation (0%), Avg Resolution (0%)

vendor_table_sortable_columns.evidence: Table has Docs, Automation, Resolution columns with ArrowUpDown sort icons. Clicking headers triggers sort_by parameter change.

vendor_detail_side_panel.evidence: Clicking vendor row opens side panel with Reference Behavior bars (PO References, Shipment References, BOL Present) and Automation Performance bars (Resolution Success, Automation Success, Validation Pass)

vendor_intel_nav_in_sidebar.evidence: Sidebar shows 'Vendor Intel' nav item with Users icon, navigates to /vendor-intelligence route

search_filter_works.evidence: Typing 'TUMALO' in search filters table to show only 3 matching vendors (TUMALO CREEK Transportation, Tumalo Creek Transportation, TUMALO CREEK TRANSPORTATION)

mocked_apis.note: All vendor intelligence APIs use real MongoDB data. Vendor profiles rebuilt from historical hub_documents collection.
